fields.title: Update agent tool to use agent names instead of task types + skills
fields.description:
Update createWorkerAgentTool to spawn agents by name from AgentRegistry.

## Changes
1. Tool parameter: type → agent (references agent name from .md file)
2. Remove skills parameter (no longer needed)
3. Load AgentDefinition by name
4. Pass definition to AgentWorker.make()

## Tool schema update
Before:
- type: task type (code, search, etc)
- complexity: low/medium/high
- skills: string[] (for custom task type)

After:
- agent: agent name (oracle, finder, rush, etc)
- complexity: low/medium/high (model routing only)
fields.close_reason: Updated agent tool: type parameter renamed to agent, skills parameter removed. Uses AgentRegistry for agent discovery.
